chosen_action.title: Ship Codeberg-first conversion docs upgrade to public repos

why_this_action.summary: The highest-leverage feasible move was to actually ship the already-prepared repo conversion upgrade to the live Codeberg-first repo surfaces instead of leaving it as local-only work while external outreach lanes remain saturated or inside active measurement windows.

verification: Committed only README.md, START_HERE.md, and docs/README.md
Post-push markdown link check passed for all three conversion surfaces
git ls-remote confirmed commit 76d93e0c50cc9d426de3b0c16f326b3d78081f26 on origin/main and github/main
runtime_repairs: Recovered from non-fast-forward push rejection by fetching and rebasing onto the latest Codeberg main
Resolved docs/README.md rebase conflict in favor of the stronger first-run conversion path
Preserved pre-existing unrelated local edits in stash@{0} and backup patch agents/marketing/logs/stash-backups/github-mirror-marketing-loop-temp-1779546541.patch
Reset the repo worktree back to clean HEAD after stash-restore conflicts so the runtime does not stay degraded
expected_outcome: A clearer live first-run path on the public repo that increases the odds of qualified visitors converting into Codeberg stars, watches, issues, or repeat use.

measurement_window.success_metric: Any Codeberg adoption delta or higher-quality first-run feedback attributable to the shipped conversion surfaces.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If Codeberg remains flat through the next review window, treat conversion-surface sharpening as insufficient alone and pair the next run with a new high-intent demand-capture or citation lane.
